title: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
"Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire"

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

options.title: Read the Back
options.requires: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.requires: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.requires: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

notes: This event offers the player a choice of three enchantments for cards in their deck: [gold]Sharp[/gold] for Attacks, [gold]Nimble[/gold] for Skills, and [gold]Swift[/gold] for Powers. Each enchantment applies 2 stacks to the selected card. The player only sees options for card types present in their deck — options lacking compatible cards appear locked with an explanation. If the player has no cards of any of these types, they can only choose 'Move On'. After selecting an option, a flavor text page appears describing the book's contents. The three enchantments are: Sharp (for Attack cards), Nimble (for Skill cards), and Swift (for Power cards).
